subject: fix(a11y): text-base-content/40 → /60 on body text and status labels
body:
Systematic audit of the 30 /40 uses flagged in docs/TODO.md. 12
bumped to /60, 18 kept at /40 (all icons or hover-resting states
where the hover variant already provides contrast).

Bumped (body text / helper text / status):
- ErrorBoundary.vue error-message paragraph (tech info but user-visible)
- InstallInstructionsModal.vue instructions list
- TransactionEditModal.vue tag helper text
- LoadingSpinner.vue loading message
- MetricCard.vue sublabel
- WorkspaceListView.vue pull-to-refresh rest label
- WorkspaceForm.vue currency-symbol helper text
- NewImportWizard.vue step indicator
- ImportStepUpload.vue file size
- ImportStepReview.vue: "Download once" note, "N ignored" count, "Loading tag suggestions" status

Kept at /40 (decorative / resting-state hover targets):
- Close/kebab/menu/upload/chevron icons with hover:text-base-content/70 variants
- BurgerMenu menu-item icon default class (hover fills in)
- ImportStepReview delete-row button (hover:text-error lifts it)
- Disabled / background-icon placements

Net effect: body copy now meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 on both cmyk and night
themes; decorative icons remain subdued as intended.

Type-check clean. 116/116 tests pass.

Tags: a11y, contrast, wcag, text-scale
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-polish
Semver: patch
title: text-base-content/40 → /60 on body text and status labels
